name: audit
description: Security audit team — 4 specialists covering different attack surfaces

agents.name: audit-injection
agents.focus: SQL injection, command injection, XSS, template injection, path traversal in all user input handlers

agents.name: audit-auth
agents.focus: Authentication bypasses, authorization flaws, session management, CSRF, privilege escalation

agents.name: audit-data
agents.focus: Sensitive data exposure, insecure storage, missing encryption, PII leaks in logs, improper error messages

agents.name: audit-deps
agents.focus: Known CVEs in dependencies, insecure defaults, missing security headers, permissive CORS, exposed debug endpoints

task_template: Audit the codebase for {agent.focus}. Report findings as: [CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW] file:line — vulnerability description — remediation suggestion.
